## How did you test it?

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`

## Security checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, logs, local databases, caches or build output.
- [ ] I did not expose provider API keys, bridge tokens or personal paths.
- [ ] I considered IPC, path validation, file writes and command execution impact.
